member.name: T:Diamond.Core.AspNetCore.Rfc7807.Rfc7807ModelValidationConversionAttribute
member.summary: Updates the default problem details object returned from the model validation to conform with RFC 7807.

member.name: M:Diamond.Core.AspNetCore.Rfc7807.Rfc7807ModelValidationConversionAttribute.OnResultExecuting(Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc.Filters.ResultExecutingContext)
member.summary: Called by the ASP.NET MVC framework after the action result executes.
member.param: Provides the context for the OnResultExecuted(ResultExecutedContext) method of an class.
